hero.subtitle: Profiline GM25 Dual Action Polisher
hero.desc: Engineered for professionals. Extreme cutting power combined with perfect balance for 8-hour shifts.

trust.item1Tooltip: Designed and assembled in our state-of-the-art European facility.
trust.item2Tooltip: Meets strict European health, safety, and environmental protection standards.
trust.item3Tooltip: Comprehensive coverage for professional daily use, including parts and labor.
trust.item4Tooltip: Fast and reliable shipping to all European Union countries.
trust.item5Tooltip: Full range of replacement parts and dedicated professional support.

gallery.title: See the GM25 Up Close
gallery.desc: Explore every detail of the Profiline GM25 from multiple angles.

specs.title: Raw Power. Refined Control.
specs.desc: The GM25 is built with uncompromising components to deliver consistent results on the toughest clear coats.
specs.spec1Desc: Relentless torque that won't bog down under pressure.
specs.spec2Desc: Cover more surface area faster with extreme cutting power.
specs.spec3Desc: Optimized airflow keeps the machine and pad cool during extended use.
specs.spec4Desc: Variable speed dial from 2200 to 5800 OPM for precise control.

performance.desc1: We know that 8-hour shifts demand ergonomic perfection. The GM25 features a CNC-machined counterweight system that virtually eliminates vibration, reducing operator fatigue and preventing micro-marring on delicate finishes.
performance.list1: Rubberized grip zones for maximum control
performance.desc2: The massive 25mm orbital throw combined with our proprietary 1200W motor means you can remove deep defects faster than ever before. It maintains pad rotation even on complex curves and under heavy pressure.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the warranty period for the Profiline GM25?
faq.a1: The GM25 comes with a comprehensive 2-year warranty covering material and workmanship defects across all European markets.
faq.a2: The GM25 includes both a 125mm (5-inch) and a 150mm (6-inch) backing plate in the box.
faq.a3: While engineered for professionals, the dual-action mechanism makes it extremely safe and easy to use, even for beginners, minimizing the risk of burning through the clear coat.
faq.a4: The machine features a massive 25mm orbital throw — one of the largest on the market — for faster correction on large panels.
faq.q5: How can I become a distributor?
faq.a5: Fill out the partner form below with your company details, and our team will review your application and respond within 48 hours.
faq.a6: Yes, we maintain a complete inventory of replacement parts including carbon brushes, backing plates, power cords, and all internal components.

b2b.title: Partner with Profiline
b2b.desc: We are expanding our European distribution network. If you represent a detailing academy, a wholesale distributor, or a premium retail outlet, we want to hear from you.
b2b.point1Desc: Secure your region with our protected distribution agreements.
b2b.point2Desc: Access to high-end media assets, POS materials, and training.
b2b.point3Desc: Highly competitive margins for volume partners.
b2b.formMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your distribution network...
b2b.formSuccess: Application received! We will contact you within 48 hours.
b2b.formError: There was an error sending your application. Please try again.

cookie.message: We use cookies to improve your experience and analyze our traffic. By continuing to use this site, you consent to our use of cookies.

footer.desc: Professional automotive detailing equipment engineered for perfection. Made in Europe.

legal.privacyContent:
# Privacy Policy
Effective Date: 1 March 2026

# 1. Data Controller
This website, profilinegm25.eu, is operated by Profiline Tools (hereinafter "we", "us", or "the Company"). We are committed to protecting the privacy and personal data of all visitors and business partners in accordance with Regulation (EU) 2016/679 (General Data Protection Regulation, "GDPR") and applicable Bulgarian data protection legislation.

Data Controller Contact:
Email: contact@profilinegm25.eu
Website: profilinegm25.eu

# 2. What Data We Collect
We collect and process the following categories of personal data:

## 2.1 B2B Inquiry Form Data
When you submit a distributor inquiry through our contact form, we collect:
- Full name
- Email address
- Company name
- Country
- Expected volume
- Message content

## 2.2 Cookie Consent Data
When you interact with our cookie consent banner, we store:
- Your consent decision (accepted or declined)
- Browser user agent string
- Timestamp of the consent action

## 2.3 Analytics Data (only with consent)
If you provide consent for analytics cookies, Google Analytics 4 (GA4) may collect:
- Anonymized IP address
- Pages visited and interaction data
- Browser type, device type, and operating system
- Referring website

# 3. Purpose of Data Processing
We process personal data for the following purposes:
- Responding to B2B distributor inquiries and evaluating partnership applications
- Website analytics and performance optimization (only with your explicit consent)
- Compliance with legal obligations
- Maintaining records of cookie consent for regulatory compliance

# 4. Legal Basis for Processing
We process your personal data based on the following legal grounds under Article 6 of the GDPR:
- Legitimate interest (Article 6(1)(f)): Processing B2B inquiry data is necessary for our legitimate business interest in responding to potential distributor partners. As this website serves exclusively business-to-business purposes, we rely on legitimate interest for inquiry processing.
- Consent (Article 6(1)(a)): Analytics cookies and third-party tracking are activated only after you provide explicit consent via our cookie banner.
- Legal obligation (Article 6(1)(c)): Certain data processing may be necessary to comply with applicable laws and regulations.

# 5. Data Storage and Security
All personal data submitted through our inquiry form is stored on Supabase infrastructure located within the European Union. We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction, including:
- Encrypted data transmission (TLS/SSL)
- Access controls and authentication
- Regular security assessments

# 6. Data Retention
- B2B inquiry data: Retained for a maximum of 3 years from the date of submission, after which it is securely deleted unless an ongoing business relationship requires further retention.
- Cookie consent logs: Retained for 1 year from the date of consent, in accordance with regulatory requirements.
- Analytics data: Subject to Google Analytics data retention settings (default 14 months).

# 7. Your Rights Under the GDPR
As a data subject, you have the following rights:
- Right of access (Article 15): You may request confirmation of whether we process your personal data and obtain a copy of such data.
- Right to rectification (Article 16): You may request correction of inaccurate personal data.
- Right to erasure (Article 17): You may request the deletion of your personal data, subject to applicable legal exceptions.
- Right to restriction of processing (Article 18): You may request that we restrict the processing of your data under certain circumstances.
- Right to data portability (Article 20): You may request to receive your personal data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format.
- Right to object (Article 21): You may object to the processing of your personal data based on legitimate interest.
- Right to withdraw consent: Where processing is based on consent, you may withdraw your consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing prior to withdrawal.

To exercise any of these rights, please contact us at: contact@profilinegm25.eu. We will respond to your request within 30 days.

# 8. Cookies
Our website uses cookies. For detailed information about the types of cookies we use, their purpose, and how to manage your preferences, please refer to our Cookie Policy.

# 9. Third-Party Data Processors
We engage the following third-party service providers who may process personal data on our behalf:
- Supabase Inc.: Database hosting and storage (EU servers)
- Vercel Inc.: Website hosting and content delivery
- Google LLC (Google Analytics 4): Website analytics (only with consent)
- Resend Inc.: Transactional email delivery for inquiry notifications

All third-party processors are bound by data processing agreements and are required to comply with the GDPR. Where data is transferred outside the EU/EEA, appropriate safeguards such as Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) are in place.

# 10. International Data Transfers
Your data is primarily stored and processed within the European Union. In cases where data may be transferred to countries outside the EU/EEA (for example, through our use of Vercel or Google services), we ensure that adequate safeguards are in place, including EU Standard Contractual Clauses.

# 11. Updates to This Policy
We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date. We encourage you to review this policy periodically.

# 12. Supervisory Authority
If you believe that our processing of your personal data infringes the GDPR, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Bulgarian Commission for Personal Data Protection (CPDP):

Commission for Personal Data Protection
Address: 2 Prof. Tsvetan Lazarov Blvd., Sofia 1592, Bulgaria
Website: www.cpdp.bg
Email: kzld@cpdp.bg

# 13. Contact Us
For any questions or concerns regarding this Privacy Policy or our data processing practices, please contact:
Email: contact@profilinegm25.eu
legal.termsContent:
# Terms & Conditions
Effective Date: 1 March 2026

# 1. Introduction
These Terms and Conditions ("Terms") govern your access to and use of the website profilinegm25.eu (the "Website"), operated by Profiline Tools (the "Company", "we", "us", or "our"). By accessing or using this Website, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you do not agree with any part of these Terms, you must discontinue use of the Website immediately.

# 2. Service Description
This Website serves as a business-to-business (B2B) product information platform for the Profiline GM25 Dual Action Orbital Polisher. The Website provides product specifications, media assets, and a distributor inquiry form for prospective business partners.

This Website does not facilitate business-to-consumer (B2C) sales. No products are sold directly through this Website, and no prices are displayed.

# 3. B2B Distributor Inquiries
The distributor inquiry form on this Website allows businesses to express interest in becoming a distribution partner. Submission of an inquiry constitutes a non-binding expression of interest and does not create a contractual obligation on either party. The Company reserves the right to evaluate and respond to inquiries at its sole discretion.

# 4. Intellectual Property
All content on this Website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, images, photographs, videos, product designs, trade names, and trademarks, is the exclusive property of Profiline Tools or its licensors and is protected by Bulgarian, European Union, and international intellectual property laws.

You may not reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works from, publicly display, or commercially exploit any content from this Website without the prior written consent of Profiline Tools.

# 5. Product Specifications
All product specifications, technical data, and descriptions presented on this Website are provided for informational purposes only. While we strive to ensure accuracy, specifications are subject to change without notice as part of our continuous product improvement process.

The Company does not warrant that the product information on this Website is complete, current, or free from errors. Actual product characteristics may vary from the descriptions and images shown.

# 6. Warranty
The Profiline GM25 is covered by a 2-year warranty valid across all European Union markets. The warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship arising under normal and intended use.

The warranty does not cover:
- Damage resulting from misuse, abuse, or unauthorized modifications
- Normal wear and tear, including carbon brushes and backing plates
- Damage caused by use of non-approved accessories or parts
- Damage resulting from failure to follow the product manual

Warranty claims must be submitted through an authorized distributor. Full warranty terms are provided with each product at the point of sale.

# 7. Limitation of Liability
To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, Profiline Tools shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or in connection with your use of this Website, including but not limited to:
- Loss of profits, revenue, data, or business opportunities
- Business interruption
- Reliance on any information provided on this Website

The Company's total liability for any claim arising from or related to this Website shall not exceed EUR 100.

Nothing in these Terms excludes or limits liability for death or personal injury caused by negligence, fraud, or any other liability that cannot be excluded or limited under applicable law.

# 8. Third-Party Links
This Website may contain links to third-party websites or services. We do not control, endorse, or assume responsibility for the content, privacy policies, or practices of any third-party websites. Your use of third-party websites is at your own risk.

# 9. Availability
We make reasonable efforts to ensure that the Website is available at all times. However, we do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free access and shall not be liable for any temporary or permanent unavailability of the Website.

# 10. Governing Law
These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Bulgaria, without regard to conflict of law principles, and in compliance with applicable European Union regulations.

# 11. Dispute Resolution
Any dispute arising out of or in connection with these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of Sofia, Republic of Bulgaria. Before initiating court proceedings, the parties shall endeavor to resolve the dispute amicably through negotiation.

# 12. Amendments
The Company reserves the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes become effective upon publication on this Website. Continued use of the Website following the posting of changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

# 13. Severability
If any provision of these Terms is held to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect.

# 14. Contact Information
For any questions regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact:
Email: contact@profilinegm25.eu
Website: profilinegm25.eu
legal.cookieContent:
# Cookie Policy
Effective Date: 1 March 2026

# 1. Introduction
This Cookie Policy explains how profilinegm25.eu (the "Website"), operated by Profiline Tools ("we", "us", or "our"), uses cookies and similar technologies. This policy should be read alongside our Privacy Policy.

# 2. What Are Cookies
Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to website operators.

# 3. Cookies We Use
We use the following categories of cookies:

## 3.1 Strictly Necessary Cookies
These cookies are essential for the basic functionality of the Website and cannot be disabled.
- Locale preference: Stores your language selection (Bulgarian or English) to provide the Website in your preferred language. Stored in the browser as a cookie. Does not contain personal data.
- Cookie consent status: Records whether you have accepted or declined non-essential cookies. Stored in localStorage. Does not contain personal data.

## 3.2 Analytics Cookies (require consent)
These cookies are set only after you provide explicit consent through our cookie banner.
- Google Analytics 4 (GA4): We use Google Analytics to understand how visitors interact with our Website, including pages visited, time on page, and navigation patterns. Google Analytics uses cookies such as _ga and _ga_[ID] to distinguish unique users and sessions.

Analytics cookies are never loaded without your prior consent.

# 4. Google Consent Mode v2
Our Website implements Google Consent Mode v2, which ensures that Google tags (including Analytics) respect your cookie preferences. When you have not provided consent or have declined cookies:
- analytics_storage is set to "denied" — no analytics cookies are placed
- ad_storage is set to "denied" — no advertising cookies are placed

When you accept cookies through our banner:
- analytics_storage is updated to "granted" — Google Analytics cookies become active

This ensures full compliance with EU privacy regulations and Google's consent requirements.

# 5. How We Obtain Consent
When you first visit our Website, a cookie consent banner is displayed at the bottom of the page. You may choose to:
- Accept: Enables analytics cookies in addition to strictly necessary cookies.
- Decline: Only strictly necessary cookies remain active. No analytics data is collected.

Your consent preference is stored in your browser's localStorage and is remembered for subsequent visits.

# 6. How to Withdraw Consent or Manage Cookies
You can withdraw your cookie consent at any time by:
- Clearing your browser's localStorage for this Website, which will cause the cookie banner to appear again on your next visit.
- Using your browser settings to delete cookies. Instructions for common browsers:
  - Chrome: Settings > Privacy and Security > Cookies
  - Firefox: Settings > Privacy & Security > Cookies and Site Data
  - Safari: Preferences > Privacy > Manage Website Data
  - Edge: Settings > Cookies and Site Permissions > Cookies

Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of the Website.

# 7. Third-Party Cookies
The only third-party cookies used on this Website are from Google Analytics 4, and they are only set after you provide explicit consent. Google may process the data collected by these cookies in accordance with its own privacy policy. For more information, see: https://policies.google.com/privacy

You can opt out of Google Analytics across all websites by installing the Google Analytics opt-out browser add-on: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout

# 8. Data Collected by Cookies
Analytics cookies may collect the following types of data:
- Anonymized IP address
- Browser type and version
- Operating system
- Screen resolution
- Pages visited and duration of visit
- Referring URL
- Interactions with Website elements

This data is used solely for statistical analysis and Website improvement and is not used to personally identify visitors.

# 9. Updates to This Policy
We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time. Any changes will be published on this page with an updated effective date. We recommend reviewing this policy periodically.

# 10. Contact Us
If you have any questions about this Cookie Policy, please contact:
Email: contact@profilinegm25.eu
Website: profilinegm25.eu
